problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
hypothesis: Shape memory alloy phase transition may resolve How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
